prompts.text: {vip}, one last ride! Take 2 sips to kick off the send-off.
{vip}, give out 3 sips to whoever organized this. Legends.
{vip}, take 3 sips -- you're about to be a married man. Let it sink in.
{vip}, give out 2 sips to whoever is most likely to get you in trouble tonight.
{player1}, raise one for the groom! Take 2 sips.
{player1}, give out 2 sips to whoever almost didn't make it tonight.
{vip}, count down from 3... What was {vip}'s first job? {vip} decides who's right. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What is {vip}'s middle name? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What is {vip}'s go-to karaoke song? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What is {vip}'s biggest fear? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What was {vip}'s childhood nickname? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What celebrity does {vip} have a man crush on? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What is {vip}'s most-used emoji? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 2 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What food could {vip} eat every day forever? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What does {vip} spend the most money on? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What is {vip}'s most embarrassing moment? {vip} decides who's closest. Winner gives out 4 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What is {vip}'s guilty pleasure TV show? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What is {vip}'s go-to drunk food? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What is {vip}'s biggest pet peeve? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What video game has {vip} sunk the most hours into? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What is {vip}'s worst habit? {vip} decides who nailed it. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What was {vip}'s dream job as a kid? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What is {vip}'s go-to drink order? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 2 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What was {vip}'s worst date ever? {vip} decides who's closest. Winner gives out 4 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What would {vip} do with a million dollars? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What is {vip}'s hidden talent? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What was {vip}'s first car? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What is {vip}'s dream vacation? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What scares {vip} the most about married life? {vip} decides who's closest. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What's the craziest thing {vip} has ever done? {vip} decides who's closest. Winner gives out 4 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What sport does {vip} think they're the best at? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What is {vip}'s favorite team? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 2 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What was {vip}'s college major (or dream major)? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What is {vip}'s most-played song? {vip} decides who's closest. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What was {vip}'s first concert? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What is {vip}'s toxic trait? {vip} decides who nailed it. Winner gives out 4 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What's {vip}'s morning routine? {vip} decides who's closest. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... How many push-ups can {vip} actually do? {vip} decides who's closest. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What app does {vip} waste the most time on? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What's {vip}'s comfort food? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 2 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What was {vip}'s worst haircut? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What is {vip}'s zodiac sign? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 2 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What would {vip}'s last meal be? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... How old was {vip} during their first kiss? {vip} decides who's closest. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What is {vip}'s signature move on the dance floor? {vip} decides who described it best. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What did {vip} get suspended/detention for (or what would they have)? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What's the most embarrassing thing in {vip}'s search history? {vip} decides who's closest. Winner gives out 4 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What's {vip}'s biggest gym flex? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What reality show would {vip} dominate? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What was {vip}'s AIM or MSN screen name? {vip} decides who's closest. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What fast food place does {vip} hit up the most? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 2 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... Where was {vip}'s first date with their partner? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... How did {vip} propose (or how did they get engaged)? {vip} decides who's closest. Winner gives out 4 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What is {vip}'s partner's pet name for {vip}? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips. Let's hear it.
{vip}, count down from 3... What do {vip} and their partner argue about the most? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What was {vip}'s first impression of their partner? {vip} decides who's closest. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... Where did {vip} and their partner meet? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What's the most romantic thing {vip} has done for their partner? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... Who said 'I love you' first -- {vip} or their partner? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What does {vip}'s partner do that drives {vip} crazy? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What is {vip}'s partner's biggest pet peeve about {vip}? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What app did they meet on (or who introduced them)? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What show have {vip} and their partner binged together? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What's {vip}'s partner's go-to order at a restaurant? {vip} decides. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... Who is the better driver -- {vip} or their partner? {vip} decides. Be honest. Winner gives out 2 sips.
{vip}, count down from 3... What's the biggest wedding planning fight been about? {vip} decides who's closest. Winner gives out 3 sips.
{vip}, truth time: What's the most embarrassing thing your partner has caught you doing? Take 2 sips.
{vip}, what's one thing about single life you'll secretly miss? Take 2 sips and be real.
{vip}, what was your honest first thought when you realized you were going to propose? Take 3 sips.
{vip}, describe your partner in 3 words. Take 1 sip per word.
{vip}, what's your partner's most annoying habit? Take 2 sips and spill.
{vip}, what's the biggest lie you've told your partner? Take 3 sips. The boys won't snitch.
{vip}, who in this room has seen you at your absolute worst? Point to them. Both drink 2.
{vip}, what's the one thing you'd change about your partner? Take 3 sips. Think before you speak.
{vip}, what's your partner's guilty pleasure that only you know? Take 3 sips.
{vip}, how nervous were you during the proposal? Rate it 1-10. Take that many sips divided by 2.
{vip}, what's the most embarrassing text you've sent your partner? Take 3 sips. Show us if you're brave.
{vip}, cold feet moment: have you had one? Take 3 sips regardless.
{vip}, what was the worst part of wedding planning? Take 2 sips.
{vip}, how long did you take to pick the ring? Take 1 sip per week.
{vip}, who was the first person you told when you decided to propose? If they're here, they give out 3 sips.
{vip}, what's the craziest thing you did while dating? Take 3 sips.
{vip}, have you ever forgotten your anniversary or an important date? Take 4 sips if yes. 2 if no.
{vip}, what's your partner's go-to complaint about you? Take 2 sips.
{vip}, rate your own cooking on a scale of 1-10. Everyone who disagrees takes 2 sips.
{vip}, what's the dumbest thing you've ever done to impress your partner? Take 3 sips.
{vip}, who in this room gives the worst relationship advice? Point to them. They take 3 sips.
{vip}, what habit does your partner want you to quit? Take 2 sips.
{vip}, did you cry at any point during the engagement? Take 3 sips if yes. Take 2 if you're lying about saying no.
{vip}, what's the most money you've spent on something your partner doesn't know about? Take 3 sips.
{vip}, what's your honest groomzilla moment? Take 2 sips and own it.
{player1}, do your best impression of {vip}'s partner. If {vip} doesn't laugh, take 3 sips.
{player1}, text your most recent ex 'miss you' or take 5 sips. Group watches.
{player1}, show the group your most embarrassing photo on your phone. Can't? Take 4 sips.
{player1}, read the last text you sent out loud. Take 2 sips for shame.
{player1}, let the group send one text from your phone to anyone. Or take 5 sips.
{player1}, call someone not here and tell them you love them. Hang up before explaining. Or take 4 sips.
{player1}, arm wrestle {vip}. Loser takes 4 sips.
{player1}, give {vip} your best roast in 15 seconds. If {vip} doesn't flinch, take 4 sips.
{player1}, show the group your screen time report. Over 5 hours? Take 3 sips.
{player1}, do 10 push-ups right now. Can't finish? Take 1 sip per push-up you missed.
{player1}, tell us your body count or take 5 sips. No judgment. Okay, a little judgment.
{player1}, show your last Google search. Embarrassing? Take 3 sips.
{player1}, chug for 5 seconds or take 4 sips. Simple math.
{player1}, speak in a British accent for the next 2 rounds. Drop it? Take 3 sips.
{player1}, make up a best man speech on the spot. 15 seconds. If {vip} cringes, take 4 sips.
{player1}, tell us {vip}'s most embarrassing story. If {vip} vetoes it, you take 4 sips.
{player1}, balance your drink on your head for 10 seconds. Spill = 5 sips.
{player1}, show the group your camera roll. They pick the most sus photo. Take 3 sips.
{player1}, recreate {vip}'s proposal. Best performance gives out 3 sips, worst takes 4.
{player1}, name 5 of {vip}'s exes. Each wrong guess = 1 sip. {vip} confirms.
{player1}, swap shirts with {vip} for 3 rounds or take 4 sips.
{player1}, do your best {vip} impression. Walk, talk, everything. If the boys approve, give out 3 sips.
{player1}, call {vip}'s partner and say 'he's behaving, I promise.' If they laugh, give out 3 sips.
{player1}, shotgun a drink with {vip}. Last to finish takes 3 extra sips.
{player1}, tell the group the worst thing you and {vip} have done together. If {vip} vetoes, take 4 sips.
{player1}, flex your biceps. Worst flex (group votes) takes 3 sips.
{player1}, write a haiku about {vip}. Bad haiku = 3 sips.
{player1}, show your Uber rating. Below 4.9? Take 3 sips.
{player1}, attempt {vip}'s signature dance move. If {vip} says it's wrong, take 3 sips.
{player1}, tell the group the worst pickup line you've ever used. Funniest story gives out 3 sips (group votes).
{player1}, take {sip_count} sips. The groom demands a sacrifice.
{player1}, take 3 sips if you've ever been a best man or groomsman.
{player1}, take 2 sips for every bachelor party you've been to.
{player1}, take {sip_count} sips. This isn't a dinner party. Drink up.
{player1}, take 3 sips if you showed up late tonight.
{player1}, take 2 sips. The best man ordered it.
{player1}, take {sip_count} sips. One last ride means you ride hard.
{player1}, take 3 sips if you've ever been turned down at a bar.
{player1}, take 2 sips for every year you've known {vip}.
{player1}, take 3 sips if you've ever passed out at a party.
{player1}, take 2 sips if you know {vip}'s partner's middle name. Don't? Take 4.
{player1}, take 3 sips if you're the designated driver. Wait, no one should be. Take 3 anyway.
{player1}, take 2 sips if you already know what you're wearing to the wedding.
{player1}, take {sip_count} sips. Pacing yourself? Wrong party.
{player1}, take 3 sips if you've lost a bet to {vip} before.
{player1}, take 2 sips. The boys need you to catch up.
{player1}, take {sip_count} sips if you've known {vip} longer than his partner has.
{player1}, take 3 sips if your ex is still in your contacts.
{player1}, take 2 sips if you've ever been kicked out of a bar.
{player1}, take 3 sips. The groom isn't going down alone.
{player1}, take 2 sips if you brought a flask. 3 if you wish you had.
{player1}, take 3 sips if you've texted {vip}'s partner to check in tonight.
{player1}, take {sip_count} sips. The wedding budget didn't cover your sobriety.
{player1}, take 2 sips if you snore louder than {vip}. He confirms.
{player1}, take 3 sips if you've ever woken up in a stranger's house.
{player1}, give out {sip_count} sips to whoever is most likely to get {vip} in trouble tonight.
{vip}, give out {sip_count} sips to whoever you think will embarrass you the most tonight.
{vip}, give out 3 sips to your day one. No explanation needed.
{player1}, give 3 sips to whoever would be the worst wingman.
{vip}, give out 2 sips to whoever planned the best part of tonight.
{player1}, give out {sip_count} sips to whoever has the wildest dating history.
{vip}, give out 3 sips to whoever has covered for you the most in life.
{vip}, give 3 sips to whoever you've known the longest.
{player1}, give {sip_count} sips to whoever is most likely to lose their wallet tonight.
{vip}, give out 3 sips however you want. Groom's privilege.
{player1}, give 3 sips to whoever will give the worst wedding speech.
{player1}, give out 2 sips to whoever is flexing the hardest tonight.
{player1}, give {sip_count} sips to whoever is most likely to get {vip}'s partner's name wrong.
{vip}, give 3 sips to whoever gives you the most unsolicited marriage advice.
{player1}, give 3 sips to whoever brought the cheapest gift. We know.
{vip}, give out {sip_count} sips to whoever you'd want in the foxhole with you.
{player1}, give 3 sips to whoever is most likely to make a toast that goes too long.
{vip}, give out 4 sips wherever you want. Groom tax.
{player1}, give 3 sips to whoever is already texting their partner.
{player1}, give out 2 sips to whoever would survive the longest in a fight.
{vip}, give 3 sips to whoever knows the most embarrassing thing about you.
{player1}, give out 2 sips to whoever drove here. Designated driver respect... but drink.
{player1}, give 3 sips to whoever would be the worst best man.
Everyone who has been to a bachelor party before -- take 1 sip per party.
Everyone who is single right now -- take 3 sips. Enjoy the freedom while it lasts.
Everyone who has been bros with {vip} for over 5 years -- give out 2 sips.
Everyone who has an ex they still think about -- take 3 sips. We won't tell.
Everyone who has been arrested or detained -- take 3 sips and tell us nothing.
Everyone in a relationship -- take 2 sips. Single guys give out 2 each.
Everyone who knows {vip}'s partner's birthday -- give out 2 sips. Don't? Take 3.
Everyone who has seen {vip} cry -- take 2 sips. Men have feelings.
Everyone who has played on a sports team with {vip} -- give out 2 sips.
Everyone who has ever lost a bet to {vip} -- take 2 sips.
Everyone take 2 sips for the groom. No exceptions. This is brotherhood.
Everyone who has been {vip}'s wingman -- give out 2 sips.
Everyone who has helped {vip} move -- give out 3 sips. True friends.
Everyone who has gotten too drunk with {vip} -- take 3 sips. Here we go again.
Everyone who has a nickname for {vip} -- say it out loud. {vip}'s least favorite? That person takes 3 sips.
Everyone who has traveled with {vip} -- give out 2 sips.
Everyone who has lied to {vip}'s partner for him -- take 3 sips. Loyalty.
Everyone who has played video games with {vip} -- take 2 sips.
Everyone who can bench more than {vip} -- give out 2 sips. Liars take 4.
Everyone who has been to a wedding this year -- take 1 sip per wedding.
Everyone who has an embarrassing photo of {vip} on their phone -- take 2 sips. Don't show it... yet.
Everyone who has crashed on {vip}'s couch -- give out 2 sips.
Everyone who has been friends with {vip} since school -- give out 3 sips.
Everyone who has {vip}'s number memorized -- give out 2 sips.
Everyone who has arm-wrestled {vip} and lost -- take 3 sips.
Everyone who has gambled with {vip} -- take 2 sips per time you lost.
Everyone who has been on a road trip with {vip} -- give out 2 sips.
Everyone who thinks they can drink {vip} under the table -- take 3 sips to prove it.
Everyone who has met {vip}'s parents -- give out 1 sip.
Everyone who has ever covered {vip}'s bar tab -- give out 3 sips. Payback time.
Everyone who has been {vip}'s roommate -- give out 3 sips. You've seen things.
Everyone who still owes {vip} money -- take 4 sips. We see you.
Everyone who knows {vip}'s ring size -- give out 3 sips. That's specific.
Everyone who almost didn't make it tonight -- take 3 sips. Glad you're here.
Everyone who has a matching tattoo with {vip} -- give out 3 sips. If no one does, {vip} takes 3.
On 3, point to who will get the drunkest tonight. Most pointed-at takes 3 sips.
On 3, point to who has known {vip} the longest. They give out 3 sips.
On 3, point to who will get married next. Most pointed-at takes 3 sips.
On 3, point to who would be the worst best man. Most pointed-at takes 4 sips.
On 3, point to who {vip} would call from jail. They give out 3 sips.
On 3, point to who knows {vip} the best. They give out 3 sips.
On 3, point to who has the worst taste in women (or men). Most pointed-at takes 4 sips.
On 3, point to who would make the best wingman. They give out 3 sips.
On 3, point to who {vip} trusts the most. They give out 4 sips.
On 3, point to who is the most whipped by their partner. Most pointed-at takes 4 sips.
On 3, point to who tells the best stories. They give out 3 sips and tell one about {vip}.
On 3, point to who is the cheapest person here. Most pointed-at takes 3 sips.
On 3, point to who would embarrass {vip} the most at the wedding. Most pointed-at takes 4 sips.
On 3, point to who is the best cook. They give out 2 sips.
On 3, point to who would bail {vip} out of jail no questions asked. They give out 3 sips.
On 3, point to who is the most competitive. Most pointed-at takes 3 sips.
On 3, point to who {vip}'s partner likes the least. Most pointed-at takes 4 sips. Ouch.
On 3, point to who is {vip}'s ride or die. They give out 4 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Arm wrestle. Right now. Loser takes 4 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who has known {vip} longer? Loser takes 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who can name more of {vip}'s exes? Winner gives out 3 sips. {vip} confirms.
{player1} vs {player2}: Name beers back and forth. First to fail drinks 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who would {vip} pick as best man? {vip} decides. The other takes 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Name sports teams. Go back and forth. First to fail drinks 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who can do a better {vip} impression? {vip} judges. Loser takes 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who has the better beard/facial hair right now? Group votes. Loser takes 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Name action movies. Go back and forth. First to fail drinks 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who has a funnier drunk story? Group votes. Loser takes 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Name rappers. Go back and forth. First to fail drinks 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who's more likely to get kicked out of the wedding reception? Group votes. Most likely takes 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Roast battle. 15 seconds each roasting each other. Group picks the winner. Loser takes 4 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who tells better jokes? One joke each. Group votes. Loser drinks 3.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who can give the better 10-second best man speech? {vip} judges. Loser takes 3 sips.
{vip} is the King. For the next {rule_turns} rounds, everyone must call {vip} 'King.' Forget = 2 sips.
prompts.rule_end_text: {vip} is no longer the King. Just a regular groom again.

prompts.text: For the next {rule_turns} rounds, no one can say {vip}'s partner's name. Say it = 2 sips.
prompts.rule_end_text: You can say the partner's name again.

prompts.text: {vip} makes a rule right now. It lasts {rule_turns} rounds. Break it = 2 sips.
For the next {rule_turns} rounds, no phones. Get caught? 3 sips. Be present, kings.
prompts.rule_end_text: Phone ban is lifted. Check your missed calls.

prompts.text: For the next {rule_turns} rounds, you must salute {vip} before taking a sip. Forget = 2 extra sips.
prompts.rule_end_text: No more saluting. At ease, soldiers.

prompts.text: For the next {rule_turns} rounds, no first names. Use last names or nicknames only. Slip up = 2 sips.
{vip} picks a drinking buddy. For {rule_turns} rounds, whenever {vip} drinks, the buddy drinks too.
prompts.rule_end_text: {vip}'s drinking buddy is released. You survived.

prompts.text: For the next {rule_turns} rounds, no one can say 'bro,' 'dude,' or 'man.' Each one = 1 sip.
prompts.rule_end_text: Bro, dude, and man are all back. Freedom.

prompts.text: For the next {rule_turns} rounds, everyone must make eye contact with {vip} before drinking. Break it = 2 sips.
prompts.rule_end_text: Eye contact rule is over. Drink without staring.

prompts.text: {player1}, take {sip_count} sips. The groom demands blood.
{player1}, take a shot for the groom. Can't? Take 4 sips instead.
{player1}, take {sip_count} sips. No questions asked. It's a bachelor party.
{player1}, take 5 sips. One last ride means no one rides sober.
{player1}, take a shot. Can't? Take 5 sips. The boys are watching.
{player1}, take {sip_count} sips. The best man signed off on this.
{vip}, take a shot. Can't? Take 4 sips. It's YOUR send-off!
{player1}, take a shot or 4 sips. For the groom!
{player1}, take 5 sips. That's the entry fee for this brotherhood.
{player1}, take a shot. Can't? Take 5 sips. No excuses on send-off night.
{player1}, take a shot or 4 sips. The groom doesn't go down alone.
Heaven! Last person to raise their glass drinks 3 sips. To the groom!
Waterfall! Everyone starts drinking. You can only stop when the person to your right stops. {vip} starts.
Everyone shotgun a drink at the same time. Last to finish takes 3 extra sips.
Dance-off! Two at a time. {vip} judges. Loser of each round takes 3 sips.
{vip}, call your partner right now. Say something nice. If they don't answer, everyone takes 2 sips.
Everyone stand. Last man standing game -- everyone drinks until someone gives up. That person takes 3 extra sips.
Roast circle! Everyone gives {vip} a one-liner roast. Best roast (group votes) gives out 5 sips.
Arm wrestling tournament! Bracket it out. Ultimate winner gives out 5 sips.
Champagne toast! Everyone take 3 sips together. For the groom. No exceptions.
{vip} picks the next song. If it's trash, he takes 4 sips. If it bangs, he gives out 4.
Everyone guess: what does {vip}'s partner do for work? {vip} judges. Everyone wrong takes 2 sips.
Everyone guess: where is {vip}'s partner originally from? {vip} judges. Wrong answers take 2 sips.
Everyone guess: what is {vip}'s partner's go-to drink order? {vip} judges. Wrong? Take 3 sips.
Everyone guess: what is {vip}'s partner's biggest pet peeve about {vip}? {vip} reveals. Wrong takes 3 sips.
Everyone guess: what would {vip}'s partner say is {vip}'s worst habit? {vip} reveals. Wrong takes 2 sips.
Everyone guess: what was {vip}'s partner's first impression of {vip}? {vip} reveals. Wrong takes 3 sips.
Everyone guess: what is {vip}'s partner most afraid of? {vip} judges. Wrong takes 2 sips.
Everyone guess: if {vip}'s partner could see him right now, what would she say? Best answer ({vip} judges) gives out 3 sips.
Best man, stand up. Give a 30-second preview of your speech. Not ready? Take 5 sips.
Best man, what is the most embarrassing thing {vip} has ever done? Tell the story or take 5 sips.
Best man, when did you first know {vip} was serious about his partner? Tell the moment. Take 2 sips.
Best man, what is {vip}'s worst habit that his partner is about to deal with forever? {vip} takes 3 sips of truth.
{vip}, say 3 things you appreciate about your best man. He takes 1 sip per compliment. No sarcasm.
Everyone who has known {vip} since childhood — take 2 sips and share one thing about young {vip} that nobody else here knows.
Everyone who met {vip} in college — take 2 sips. What was {vip} like back then? One word each.
Everyone who met {vip} through work — take 2 sips. Did you ever think he'd be getting married? Be honest.
Whoever has been friends with {vip} the longest — stand up. Tell us a story about {vip} from before anyone else here knew him. Take 2 sips.
Whoever is the newest friend in this group — how did you meet {vip}? Tell the story. Take 2 sips.
Groomsmen — go around and each say your favorite memory with {vip}. Keep it to 20 seconds each. Take 1 sip after.
{player1}, text {vip}'s partner from your phone: "He's being so good tonight." Screenshot it. Take 2 sips.
{player1}, call {vip}'s mom right now on speaker. Tell her {vip} is behaving. 15 seconds minimum. Refuse? Take 5 sips.
{vip}, write your wedding vows right now. 30 seconds. Read them out loud. The boys rate them 1-10. Under 5? Take 3 sips.
{player1}, go up to a stranger and tell them {vip} is getting married. Get them to give {vip} marriage advice. Report back. Take 2 sips.
{player1}, get a stranger to take a group photo with the bachelor party. Fail? Take 4 sips.
{vip}, recreate your proposal right now using {player1} as the stand-in. Full effort. Take 3 sips after.
{player1}, give a 15-second toast to {vip} and his partner. Make it heartfelt. Take 2 sips for bravery.
On 3, hold up fingers for how many kids you think {vip} will have. {vip} reveals his real answer. Everyone wrong takes 2 sips.
On 3, everyone guess: who will wear the pants in the marriage — {vip} or his partner? {vip} reveals. Wrong side takes 3 sips.
Everyone guess what {vip} and his partner's first big argument as a married couple will be about. Best answer ({vip} judges) gives out 3 sips.
On 3, everyone guess: what will {vip} give up first — boys' nights, gaming, or sleeping in? {vip} reveals. Wrong takes 2 sips.
Everyone predict what married {vip} will look like in 5 years. Go around. Best description ({vip} judges) gives out 3 sips.
On 3, everyone guess: who will cry first at the altar — {vip} or his partner? {vip} decides. Wrong takes 3 sips.
Mini-toast round. Go around the table. Everyone raises their glass and gives {vip} one sentence of advice or one reason he'll be a great husband. Take 1 sip after.
Everyone say one word that describes {vip} as a friend. Go around. {vip} takes 1 sip per word.
{player1}, tell {vip} one thing you've never said to him but always wanted to. Take 3 sips. This is the night.
Everyone share your favorite memory of a night out with {vip}. Best story (group votes) gives out 3 sips.
Last ride roll call. Go around — everyone says how they met {vip} in one sentence. Take 1 sip after. {vip} takes 1 for each person.
Everyone raise your glass. On 3, everyone shouts one word that describes {vip} as a man. {vip} drinks for every word he respects.
{player1}, give {vip} the worst marriage advice you can think of. Group votes if it's actually good. Take 3 sips.
{player1}, what is {vip}'s biggest red flag as a partner? Say it to his face. {vip} takes 3 sips of truth.
Everyone go around and rate {vip} as a partner, 1-10. He takes 1 sip for every rating under 8.
{player1}, finish this sentence: "Married {vip} will definitely..." Take 2 sips.
{player1}, what is one thing {vip}'s partner has changed about him — for better or worse? Be honest. Take 2 sips.
Everyone guess: what would {vip}'s partner say is the thing she loves MOST about {vip}? {vip} reveals. Closest gives out 3 sips.
Everyone guess: what would {vip}'s partner say is {vip}'s most embarrassing moment? {vip} reveals. Closest gives out 3 sips.
Everyone guess: if {vip}'s partner made a rule for tonight, what would it be? Best answer ({vip} judges) gives out 3 sips.
Everyone guess: what would {vip}'s partner rate {vip} as a boyfriend, 1-10? {vip} reveals what he thinks she'd say. Furthest off takes 3 sips.
